title: SHAPE datasets from RNA chemical probing experiments modulates structural ensembles

steps.instruction: Normalized SHAPE reactivity for pre-miR20b and CDE2GG, HIV-1 RRE, and FIRRE as reported in 'Cooperativity in RNA chemical probing experiments modulates RNA 2D structural ensembles'.
